items.title: Bitcoin holds $71,000 despite Trump warning of strikes on Iran's oil-rich Kharg Island
items.summary: The largest cryptocurrency is up 4.2% on the week despite Friday's reversal, with attention now turning to the Fed meeting on March 17-18 and whether oil above $100 forces a shift in rate expectations.

items.title: Bitcoin quickly drops 3.5% as fresh Iran escalation short-circuits crypto rally
items.summary: Surging to a near one-month high of $74,000, bitcoin reversed back to just above $71,000 as news of U.S. military movements in the Middle East rattled risk assets.

items.title: Bitcoin's recent crash to $60,000 warned stocks first – now they're following
items.summary: Bitcoin has once again acted as a leading indicator for risk assets, plunging sharply before the ongoing global stock market swoon.

items.title: Pi rallies more than 30% after Kraken announces listing
items.summary: Bybit previously declined to list the mobile crypto mining platform, with CEO Ben Zhou citing warnings from Chinese police that the project is a scam.

items.title: Bitcoin price eyes $74K rematch as US PCE inflation boosts crypto, stocks
items.summary: Bitcoin bulls squeezed the market toward $74,000 again as promising US inflation data buoyed risk assets, but BTC price forecasts stayed mixed.

items.title: Bitcoin can survive 72% of the world's submarine cables being cut, but a targeted attack on five hosting providers could cripple it
items.summary: A Cambridge study spanning 11 years and 68 verified cable failures found that Bitcoin's physical infrastructure is far more resilient than previously understood, with TOR adoption actually strengthening the network.

items.title: BlackRock says 'exotic' crypto ETFs not part of its strategy
items.summary: BlackRock launched a staked Ether exchange-traded fund on Thursday, expanding its crypto offerings beyond its flagship spot Bitcoin and Ether ETFs that launched in 2024.

items.title: Stablecoins could form backbone of global payments in 10 years: Billionaire
items.summary: Stanley Druckenmiller said stablecoins are more efficient, faster and cheaper than fiat running on traditional banking infrastructure.

items.title: Bitcoin nearly overtakes $74K, as data suggests bear market is not over
items.summary: Bitcoin showed remarkable strength throughout the week, but BTC’s correlation to tech stocks and its reactive spot ETF flows suggest the bear market isn’t over yet.

items.title: A huge gap between network use and token value is the most important thing happening in XRP right now
items.summary: Daily payments on XRPL surged to 2.7 million, AMM pools exploded to 27,000, and tokenized asset value jumped 35% in 30 days. XRP is down 26% this year.

items.title: Court closes Custodia fight with Federal Reserve just as Fed opens master-account door
items.summary: Just days after the Federal Reserve granted a limited master account to Kraken, crypto bank Custodia's years-long court battle with the Fed concludes in a loss.

items.title: Circle overtakes BlackRock in tokenized Treasuries as market hits record $11 billion
items.summary: Circle’s USYC tokenized U.S. Treasury fund has grown to $2.2 billion, surpassing BlackRock’s BUIDL fund as investors increasingly seek onchain yield and collateral.

items.title: Arthur Hayes: Strong Revenue and Real Trading Could Send HYPE to $150
items.summary: Hayes said Hyperliquid’s strong revenue, real trading activity and disciplined token supply could push the token to new highs.

items.title: One mysterious investor made $2.5 million profit in hours by betting big on the latest Trump gala news
items.summary: A dormant crypto whale just bet $7 million on the Trump memecoin after a new Mar-a-Lago gala was announced, sparking a 60% rally for the struggling token.

items.title: MoonPay introduces Ledger-secured AI crypto agents to address wallet key risks
items.summary: The feature allows users to verify and sign every transaction generated by an AI agent using a Ledger hardware device, ensuring private keys never leave the hardware signer.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation publishes new mandate defining its role, core principles
items.summary: The document comes at a point of transition for the organization, following shifts in the blockchain's technical roadmap and the resignation of a co-executive director.

items.title: Stablecoins, bitcoin could reshape finance, Stanley Druckenmiller says
items.summary: The billionaire investor said stablecoins could become the whole payment system in 10-15 years, and reiterated that crypto might replace the U.S. dollar as the global reserve currency.

items.title: Circle's USDC volumes top Tether's USDT for first time since 2019, prompting sell-side price target hike
items.summary: Japanese investment bank Mizuho remains neutral on Circle, but lifted it price target to $120 from $100.

items.title: Bitcoin rises to one-month high of $73,800, continuing to outperform since start of Iran war
items.summary: Falling oil prices are helping, but a bounce seemed in the cards after some of the worst sentiment in bitcoin's history.

items.title: U.S. sanctions 6 people, 2 companies that laundered $800 million in crypto for North Korea
items.summary: The Treasury Department said North Korea infiltrated IT workers into U.S. businesses and channeled their wages back to the country to fund weapons of mass destruction programs.
